name: Drawstring Bag - Green Festival Stripe
description: Handwoven drawstring shoulder bag in bright green with blue, yellow, and red woven bands, braided straps, and tassel cord details.

name: Cushion Cover - Ivory Navy Elephant Panel
description: Ivory handwoven cushion cover with a navy elephant motif, fine vertical linework, and patterned top and bottom border bands.

name: Cushion Cover - Red Diamond Border
description: Cream cushion cover with deep red geometric borders, a framed center panel, and four connected diamond motifs across fine woven stripes.

name: Cushion Cover - Sunset Diamond Lines
description: Vibrant cushion cover with red, orange, yellow, and black side bands surrounding a cream center filled with vertical diamond line motifs.

name: Cushion Cover - Amber Plaid Diamond
description: Bold amber, black, and white cushion cover with plaid paneling, checkered corner blocks, and a centered layered diamond motif.

name: Cushion Cover - Black Crosswork Square
description: Black cushion cover with beige crosswork patterning, striped edge bands, and a centered square panel of compact woven lines.

name: Cushion Cover - Black Beige Window Grid
description: Graphic cushion cover with a black grid over beige woven rectangles, creating a repeated window-like geometric pattern.

name: Cushion Cover - Ivory Black Block Grid
description: Ivory cushion cover with a repeated black block grid pattern, combining clean rectangular motifs with a simple modern woven finish.

name: Wall Hanger - Earth Diamond Heritage Panel
description: Earth-tone wall hanger with layered ivory diamond borders, a central geometric medallion field, and small red and amber accent diamonds.

name: Wall Hanger - Ivory Navy Diamond Arrows
description: Ivory and navy wall hanger with vertical pinstripes, stacked diamond medallions, arrow side motifs, and a clean framed layout.

name: Wall Hanger - Monochrome Star Panel
description: Black and white wall hanger with three central star motifs, checkerboard border panels, and framed corner blocks for a high-contrast heritage look.

name: Wall Hanger - Crimson Diamond Arrows
description: Cream wall hanger with black and crimson diamond motifs, arrow side columns, fine vertical striping, and narrow red border accents.

name: Wall Hanger - Monochrome Labyrinth Diamond
description: Large black and ivory wall hanger with a bold central diamond, stepped labyrinth linework, and repeated star motifs around the border.

name: Wall Hanger - Midnight Elephant Spectrum
description: Color-rich wall hanger on a black field with blue, purple, orange, yellow, and red bands framing a central elephant motif.

name: Wall Hanger - Black Tan Linear Diamonds
description: Tall black and tan wall hanger with vertical stripe columns, three stacked diamond medallions, and precise stepped geometric linework.

name: Wall Hanger - Charcoal Ivory Diamond Field
description: Charcoal and ivory wall hanger with dense nested diamond patterning, framed border bands, and small red and amber accent motifs.
